title: Pod Scheduler Config
description: Configuration for the pod-based crank scheduler. Defines the cron schedule, available worker queues, machine pods, and benchmark scenarios. The scheduler expands every (scenario x pod) combination into runs, packs them into stages so no physical machine is double-booked, and emits an Azure DevOps pipeline YAML.

pods.description: All available machine pods. Each pod is a fixed group of machines (SUT + optional load + optional DB) that always run together.

scenarios.description: Benchmark scenarios to run. Each scenario targets one or more pods.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the schedule summary.

schedule.description: 5-field cron expression. The hour field must be a single integer or 'H/N' (no lists/ranges/'*') so split YAMLs can offset the hour deterministically.

queues.description: Service-bus queue names. The Nth run in a stage is dispatched to queues[N % len(queues)].

yaml_generation.description: Controls how the schedule is split across multiple YAML files.

target_yaml_count.description: Number of pipeline YAML files to produce. Use >1 to spread runtime across separate scheduled pipelines.

schedule_offset_hours.description: Hours to offset the cron between split YAMLs. The Nth split shifts the hour field by N * schedule_offset_hours.

pipeline.description: Optional overrides for pipeline-level plumbing rendered into the YAML.

name.description: Unique pod identifier referenced by scenarios.pods.

machines.description: Physical machines used by this pod, paired position-by-position with the profiles array. Two pods that share a physical machine cannot run in the same stage.

profiles.description: Crank profile names, paired position-by-position with the machines array. The Nth entry's role is the Nth of [sut, load, db]; a 1-entry list declares a SUT-only pod, 2 entries adds a load generator, 3 entries adds a database.

name.description: Display name. Combined with the pod name to form the AzDO job id (after sanitization).

template.description: Path to the AzDO scenario template invoked by every run of this scenario (relative to the build/ directory).

type.description: Number of machine roles required. Use 'single' (SUT only), 'dual' (SUT+load), or 'triple' (SUT+load+db). Integer 1/2/3 is also accepted for back-compat.

pods.description: Pods this scenario targets. Each entry must match a pods[].name. Duplicates are rejected.

estimated_runtime.description: Estimated runtime in minutes. Used by the scheduler's longest-job-first packing.

timeout.description: Optional explicit AzDO timeoutInMinutes override. When unset, the generator picks max(120, min(240, ceil(2 * estimated_runtime))).
